The gradle-wrapper.jar must be present here.
Run this from the project root to generate it automatically:

  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.4

OR download directly:
  curl -Lo gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar \
    https://github.com/gradle/gradle/raw/v8.4.0/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar

It is NOT included in this project for size/license reasons.
Most IDEs (Android Studio) will offer to download it automatically on first open.
